sectionSubtitle: Ways to engage with us — from a single assessment to ongoing partnership. Every package bundles our capabilities into a clear path forward. Assessment is baked into every engagement, never extra.

packages.name: Clarity
packages.subtitle: See where you stand. Know what to fix first.
packages.body: A comprehensive assessment to identify vulnerabilities, map your compliance posture, and define a clear path forward.

packages.name: Blueprint
packages.subtitle: Security designed into your foundation from day one.
packages.body: Build your next venture on a solid foundation with security baked into every layer.

packages.name: Independence
packages.subtitle: Break free from cloud dependency. Own your infrastructure.
packages.body: Accelerate your growth with a robust, scalable, and secure infrastructure plan — with architecture and hardening included.

packages.name: Clearance
packages.subtitle: Audit-ready. Enterprise-deal-ready.
packages.body: Ensure your systems meet industry compliance standards and are ready for rigorous audits.

packages.name: Beacon
packages.subtitle: Your long-term security architect — always available, never required.
packages.body: Monthly reviews, strategic guidance, incident advisory, and architectural evolution. A fractional security architect who knows your stack.

addons.name: Build Partnership
addons.subtitle: Add to any blueprint
addons.body: Your team builds it. We make sure they build it right. Weekly syncs, async access, training, milestone reviews, decision log, and post-implementation validation.

addons.name: Observability
addons.subtitle: Add to any engagement
addons.body: Proactive monitoring and scheduled reports. Automated critical alerts, bi-weekly reports, and engineer review. Not a 24/7 SOC — but critical findings reach you fast.

fullConstellation.name: Full Constellation
fullConstellation.subtitle: The complete security overhaul. Every capability. One engagement.
fullConstellation.body: From assessment to architecture, DevSecOps to compliance, sovereignty to advisory — the most comprehensive engagement we offer. For teams ready to transform their security posture end to end.

everyEngagement.title: Discovery & Assessment
everyEngagement.desc: Baked in, never extra. Every engagement starts with understanding your environment.

everyEngagement.title: Blueprint + Starter Templates
everyEngagement.desc: Working artifacts your team can build from — not just recommendations.

everyEngagement.title: Knowledge Transfer
everyEngagement.desc: Your team learns to maintain what we design. That's the point.

footer: Starting from pricing. Exact cost determined after a free discovery call. What influences final pricing: scope complexity, infrastructure size, number of environments, compliance frameworks required, team size. We scope every engagement individually — and we're transparent about what drives cost.
